title: ProcessMaker Task
description: Schema for a ProcessMaker task (process request token)

element_id.description: BPMN element ID of the task node

element_name.description: Display name of the BPMN element

process_id.description: ID of the process this task belongs to

process_request_id.description: ID of the process request this task is part of

user_id.description: ID of the user assigned to this task

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the task was completed

data.description: Form data associated with the task

created_at.description: Timestamp when the task was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated
